title: Ashby Jobs Scraper
description: Scrape job listings from Ashby job boards. Provide an Ashby board URL and the actor collects structured listing data with optional job detail enrichment.

startUrl.title: Ashby board URL
startUrl.description: Ashby board URL or a job URL on an Ashby board. The actor normalizes job URLs back to the board before scraping.

collectDetails.title: Collect job details
collectDetails.description: If enabled, the actor opens each Ashby job page to collect description and application form details.

results_wanted.title: Maximum number of jobs
results_wanted.description: Maximum number of jobs to save.

max_pages.title: Maximum number of pages
max_pages.description: Compatibility field retained from the previous actor. Ashby boards return all jobs in a single page, so this value is ignored.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Optional proxy configuration for board and detail requests.
